_comment: Central allowlist for SDK base image vulnerabilities. Shared across all connector repos. Updated by SDK team. CODEOWNERS: SDK/security team only.
_renewal_note: Expiry dates staggered by severity. CRITICAL: 15 days. HIGH: 30 days. Review before expiry. Enforced by .github/scripts/validate_allowlist.py via _expiry_policy below.

CVE-2026-33814.reason: Base image - Dapr runtime dependency (Go stdlib used by daprd binary)

CVE-2026-27137.reason: Base image - Go stdlib in daprd 1.17.4-r0 (Wolfi dapr-daprd-1.17). Fixed in Go 1.26.1; awaiting Wolfi rebuild of dapr-1.17 on newer Go toolchain.

CVE-2026-33810.reason: Base image - Go stdlib in daprd 1.17.4-r0 (Wolfi dapr-daprd-1.17). Fixed in Go 1.26.2; awaiting Wolfi rebuild of dapr-1.17 on newer Go toolchain.

CVE-2024-35515.reason: No patched version of sqlitedict available - upstream has not released a fix as of 2026-04-16

CVE-2026-23949.reason: Base image - Chainguard Wolfi system Python package

CVE-2026-24049.reason: Base image - Chainguard Wolfi system Python package

CVE-2026-33816.reason: Base image - Dapr Go dependency, fix available in 5.9.0

CVE-2026-27140.reason: Base image - Dapr runtime, fix available in 1.17.5-r0

CVE-2026-32281.reason: Base image - Dapr runtime, fix available in 1.17.5-r0

CVE-2026-32283.reason: Base image - Dapr runtime, fix available in 1.17.5-r0

GHSA-85gx-3qv6-4463.reason: Base image - Dapr runtime, fix available in 1.17.5

CVE-2026-35469.reason: Base image - Go dependency, fix available in 0.5.1

CVE-2023-45853.reason: MiniZip heap overflow in zlib contrib. The zlib1g binary package ships only libz.so.1 and does NOT contain the vulnerable zipOpenNewFileInZip4_64 code - that lives in the separate minizip/libminizip1 packages, which are not installed in connector images (verified via Debian package file-list). No fix available upstream: zlib maintainers consider MiniZip contrib, Debian has tracked this without a patch for 18+ months. Blocks atlan-mssql-app releases.

CVE-2026-6100.reason: Base image - Chainguard python-3.10/3.11/3.12/3.13-base. Upstream fix available (3.10.20-r3, 3.11.15-r2, 3.13.13-r2), pending SDK v2.8.x base rebuild. Note: v3.2.0 base already includes the patched packages.

CVE-2026-4786.reason: Base image - Chainguard python-3.11/3.13-base. Upstream fix available (3.11.15-r2, 3.13.13-r2), pending SDK v2.8.x base rebuild. Note: v3.2.0 base already includes the patched packages.

CVE-2026-33871.reason: Base image - Jackson Java transitive in application-sdk-main:2.7.3 (likely via Dapr tooling). No fix released upstream. Connector apps are Python at runtime and do not invoke Jackson code paths; review at expiry to track upstream patch availability.

CVE-2026-33870.reason: Base image - Jackson Java transitive in application-sdk-main:2.7.3 (likely via Dapr tooling). No fix released upstream. Connector apps are Python at runtime and do not invoke Jackson code paths; review at expiry to track upstream patch availability.

CVE-2026-41066.reason: Connector transitive - lxml pulled in by redshift-connector (aws/amazon-redshift-python-driver). Fix is in lxml>=6.1.0, but redshift-connector 2.1.10 pins lxml<6.0.0 in its package metadata. Bumping lxml in connector apps forces a downgrade of redshift-connector to 2.1.7. Allowlisting until upstream relaxes the cap; tracking via aws/amazon-redshift-python-driver. Connector code uses lxml only for SOAP/XML parsing of trusted Redshift IAM responses, not untrusted input.

CVE-2025-66418.reason: Base image - Chainguard Wolfi py3-pip-wheel@26.0.1-r2. Fix available in 26.1.1-r0; awaiting SDK base image rebuild.

CVE-2025-66471.reason: Base image - Chainguard Wolfi py3-pip-wheel@26.0.1-r2. Fix available in 26.1.1-r0; awaiting SDK base image rebuild.

CVE-2026-21441.reason: Base image - Chainguard Wolfi py3-pip-wheel@26.0.1-r2. Fix available in 26.1.1-r0; awaiting SDK base image rebuild.

CVE-2026-42304.reason: Python transitive dependency. Fix available only in Twisted 26.4.0rc2 (pre-release); no stable fix yet. Review at expiry for stable release.

GHSA-82j2-j2ch-gfr8.reason: Base image - Rust dependency in Dapr runtime. Fix available in 0.103.13; awaiting SDK base image rebuild with updated Dapr.

CVE-2026-41889.reason: Upstream fix available but need immediate unblock for v2.x.x releases for SDR locked app releases.
